ongoing_stories.headline: China nationwide AV permit freeze
ongoing_stories.last_status: Active — no resumption timeline confirmed as of late May 2026. All new AV permits suspended. Fleet additions, new test programmes, and new city expansions blocked. Existing services continue to operate.
status_change_triggers: Official MIIT or Ministry of Transport announcement on resumption or extension
Any operator receiving a new permit
Any official timeline given or revised
ongoing_stories.notes: Triggered by March 31, 2026 Baidu Apollo Go mass-stall incident in Wuhan — 100+ vehicles simultaneously halted by software failure, passengers trapped up to 2 hours. Three central ministries convened all eight major robotaxi operators. Stock impact at announcement: PONY -5.5%, WRD -4.7%.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo NHTSA recall — 3,791 vehicles, flooding defect
ongoing_stories.last_status: Open — interim fix deployed (tighter weather restrictions, updated map data) but no permanent fix submitted. NHTSA has flagged in writing that no permanent fix has been received. Ongoing flooding incidents in Texas and Atlanta through late May have resulted in additional service suspensions.
status_change_triggers: Permanent fix submitted or approved by NHTSA
NHTSA closes or escalates the investigation
Waymo issues a new interim fix
ongoing_stories.notes: Recall covers 5th- and 6th-generation Waymo Driver systems manufactured from 2022 through April 20, 2026. Initiated after an unoccupied vehicle was swept into a San Antonio creek on April 20 due to a software defect causing AVs to slow but not stop when encountering flooded roads at higher speeds.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo freeway ride suspension — construction zone edge cases
ongoing_stories.last_status: Ongoing — surface streets operational in all affected cities; freeway rides suspended pending software update. Atlanta city operations were also paused briefly but have since resumed per Waymo. Affected cities: San Francisco, Los Angeles, Phoenix, Miami.
status_change_triggers: Official freeway resumption announced by Waymo
ongoing_stories.notes: Triggered May 21 after robotaxis were observed struggling with highway construction zones. A viral incident on X showed a vehicle driving through traffic cones. Waymo proactively suspended all freeway rides across the US network and paused Atlanta operations while issuing a software fix.

notes: This registry provides cross-session memory for the AV Intelligence Digest Agent. It is read at the start of each daily run (Task 0) and written back at the end (Task 7). Stories are removed when last_status contains 'Resolved' and last_updated is more than 7 days ago.
